name: skin-clay
title: Claymorphism skin
description: Claymorphism concept skin: puffy inflated 3D, pastel palette, big rounded corners. A CSS overlay scoped to [data-skin="clay"] over unmodified shadcn components.
docs: 1) @import "./skins/clay.css"; in your globals.css.  2) Set data-skin="clay" on <html>.
